english_text: Good morning to all of you, may this day bring you peace and many blessings.
hint: Greet a group in the morning and wish them blessings

english_text: Peace be upon you and upon your entire household and all the people you love.
hint: Give the Islamic greeting of peace

english_text: And upon you also be peace, welcome to our village, you are most welcome here.
hint: Return the greeting of peace and welcome a visitor

english_text: How did you sleep, did the mosquitoes disturb you, or did you rest well last night?
hint: Ask how someone slept and if mosquitoes disturbed them

english_text: I slept very well, thank God, the breeze came and it was cool all through the night.
hint: Say you slept well thanks to a cool breeze

english_text: Welcome home, we have been waiting for you, come and sit and eat with us.
hint: Welcome someone home and invite them to eat

english_text: How is the family at home, are the children well and the old people keeping strong?
hint: Ask about someone's family and elderly relatives

english_text: Everyone is fine, thank God, and we pray God keeps you and your own family well too.
hint: Say all are well and pray for the other person's family

english_text: It has been a very long time since I saw you, where have you been hiding yourself?
hint: Say it's been long and ask where someone has been

english_text: I have been busy with the farm and the children, time flies when there is so much to do.
hint: Say you've been busy with farm and children

english_text: Welcome to our home, please sit down and let us bring you something to drink first.
hint: Welcome a guest and offer them a drink

english_text: Good evening to you and your family, I hope the day was good to all of you.
hint: Give an evening greeting and hope their day was good

english_text: Good afternoon, may your afternoon be full of good news and God's blessing.
hint: Give an afternoon greeting with blessings

english_text: Come in, come in, do not stand at the door, this is your own home too.
hint: Invite someone in warmly and make them feel at home

english_text: How are the children growing? Are they eating well and going to school every day?
hint: Ask how the children are growing and attending school

english_text: Thank God they are all well and getting bigger every day, the youngest just started walking.
hint: Say children are growing and the youngest just learned to walk

english_text: We have not seen you in so long, have you come back to stay or just passing through?
hint: Ask if someone has returned for good or just passing through

english_text: I have come back for good, I missed this place and these people too much to stay away.
hint: Say you came back for good because you missed home

english_text: You have grown so tall and strong since the last time I saw you, look at you now!
hint: Express surprise at how much someone has grown

english_text: My grandmother always greets everyone by name and asks about each person individually.

english_text: Whenever my uncle visits he greets the elders first before he even sits down to rest.

english_text: Good morning to you, teacher, how are you feeling after the long journey from the city?

hint: Say you thank God for a new day every morning at sunrise

english_text: In our culture, you greet every elder you pass on the road even if you do not know them.

english_text: The children run to greet their father every evening when they hear his voice at the gate.
hint: Say children run to greet their father every evening

english_text: After a long journey it is so good to see the faces of your family waiting at the door.

hint: Say someone greeted in three languages before using a shared one

english_text: Good morning, I hope the rains came to your farm last night and your crops are happy.

english_text: Welcome back from the hospital, we are so glad to see you looking well and strong again.

english_text: May God grant you a long life and keep all your family in good health every single day.

english_text: She always ends her greetings with a prayer for whoever she is speaking to at the time.

english_text: Good afternoon uncle, please sit and rest, I will bring water for you to wash your hands.

hint: Say fishermen leave before six before the wind picks up

english_text: The hottest part of the year is just before the first rains when the air sits heavy and still.
hint: Say the year is hottest just before the rains when air is heavy

english_text: We always store extra water in the big drums before the pipe goes off in the dry months.
hint: Say you store water in drums before the pipe stops in dry months

english_text: It has been six weeks without any rain and the crops are beginning to wilt in the fields.
hint: Say six rainless weeks are causing crops to wilt in the fields

english_text: The evening sky turned red before the storm and we knew it would be a powerful one tonight.
hint: Say a red evening sky warned of the powerful storm to come

english_text: Time passes so fast when you are busy, I cannot believe this year is already almost over.
hint: Say time passes fast when you're busy and the year is almost done

english_text: The storm season brings dangerous lightning and we always unplug everything in the house.
hint: Say storm season brings lightning so you unplug everything

english_text: Could you explain to me what this document is asking me to sign and what it means?
hint: Ask someone to explain a document before you sign it

english_text: I need to find someone who can translate this letter from French into English for me.
hint: Say you need someone to translate a letter from French to English

english_text: My child needs the school enrollment form, where do I go to collect it from please?
hint: Ask where to collect the school enrollment form for your child

english_text: Is there a place nearby where I can print and photocopy some documents today?
hint: Ask if there is a nearby printing and photocopying service

english_text: I would like to file a complaint about the water supply, who should I speak to here?
hint: Ask who to speak to about making a water complaint

english_text: Can you help me fill in this form because I cannot read all the small letters clearly?
hint: Ask for help filling a form because you can't read the small print

english_text: I need to reach the next town urgently, is there any vehicle going that way today?
hint: Say you urgently need a vehicle to the next town

english_text: Do you know if the health center is still open at this time on a Saturday afternoon?
hint: Ask if the health center is open on Saturday afternoon

english_text: My phone ran out of credit and I need to make one important call, may I borrow yours?
hint: Ask to borrow someone's phone for one important call

english_text: I was told to collect a package here but the person who sent it did not give me a reference.
hint: Say you came to collect a package but have no reference number

english_text: How do I register my child for the national school examinations that are coming up?
hint: Ask how to register a child for the national school exams

english_text: I lost my identity card last week and I need to know how to get a replacement quickly.
hint: Say you lost your identity card and need a replacement

english_text: Can you hold this for me while I go to the tap to wash my hands before eating?
hint: Ask someone to hold something while you wash your hands

english_text: Is this the queue for registering a new mobile number or for paying the bill only?
hint: Ask if the queue is for new registration or bill payment only

english_text: I need someone to witness my signature on this agreement, will you do it for me?
hint: Ask someone to witness your signature on an agreement

english_text: The taxi driver dropped me at the wrong location, how do I get to where I need to be?
hint: Say the taxi took you to the wrong place and ask for directions

english_text: There is a strong smell of smoke coming from next door, should we be worried about fire?
hint: Ask if smoke from next door could mean fire is a danger

english_text: I have been told that my application was rejected but nobody has told me the reason why.
hint: Say your application was rejected without any explanation

english_text: Can you please show me how to use this machine, I have never operated one like this before?
hint: Ask someone to show you how to use an unfamiliar machine

english_text: I need to report that there is a broken water pipe at the corner of our road leaking badly.
hint: Say you want to report a broken leaking water pipe

english_text: What documents do I need to bring to register the birth of my child at the office?
hint: Ask what documents are needed to register a birth

english_text: I have been coming every day for a week and nobody can tell me when my case will be heard.
hint: Say you've come every day for a week with no news on your case

english_text: The medicine they gave me last time made me feel worse, not better, what should I do?
hint: Say your last medicine made you worse and ask what to do

english_text: I am looking for work and someone told me this is the place to ask about available jobs.
hint: Say you are job-seeking and were told to ask here

english_text: Can you give me a receipt for this payment so I have proof that I paid what I owed?
hint: Ask for a receipt as proof of payment

english_text: I am so happy right now that I feel like singing and dancing in the middle of the road.
hint: Say you're so happy you feel like singing and dancing in the road

english_text: My heart is full of joy because my daughter passed her exams and will go to university.
hint: Say your heart is full of joy because daughter passed for university

english_text: When I heard the good news I could not stop smiling for the rest of the entire day.
hint: Say you couldn't stop smiling all day after hearing good news

english_text: I feel light as a feather today, everything seems bright and the world feels very good.
hint: Say you feel light
column8: and the world feels wonderful today

english_text: The happiness I felt when I held my first child for the very first time is impossible to describe.
hint: Say the joy of holding your first baby was impossible to describe

english_text: My whole body fills with warmth whenever I see my family gathered together in one place.
hint: Say warmth fills you whenever the whole family gathers together

english_text: We laughed until our stomachs hurt at the story the old man told us last night.
hint: Say you laughed so hard your stomach hurt at an old man's story

english_text: Today is a very good day and I want to thank God for every small blessing in my life.
hint: Give thanks for the small blessings on a good day

english_text: I cannot contain my excitement, I have been looking forward to this day for so long now.
hint: Say you're bursting with excitement for a long-awaited day

english_text: The wedding was so joyful and full of dancing and singing that nobody wanted to go home.
hint: Say the wedding was so joyful nobody wanted to leave

english_text: She squealed with delight when she saw the surprise that we had prepared for her birthday.
hint: Say she squealed with delight at her birthday surprise

english_text: When my father came home after two years away, I ran to him and would not let him go.
hint: Say you ran to your father and held on when he came home after two years

english_text: The whole village celebrated when the school results came and seven children had passed.
hint: Say the village celebrated when seven children passed the school exams

english_text: I have never felt so proud in my life as when my son gave his first speech at graduation.
hint: Say you never felt prouder than at your son's graduation speech

english_text: Happiness is when you have good health, a roof over your head, and your family near you.
hint: Define happiness as health

english_text: I feel very sad today because my old friend left this morning to go back to his village.
hint: Say you're sad because an old friend left to go back to his village

english_text: The grief of losing a parent is something that stays with you for the rest of your life.
hint: Say the grief of losing a parent stays with you forever

english_text: My heart sank when I heard the news and I sat down because my legs went weak under me.
hint: Say your heart sank and legs went weak when you heard bad news

english_text: She has been crying quietly to herself ever since she got the letter three days ago.
hint: Say she has been crying quietly since receiving a letter

english_text: The loneliness of being far from home is something I feel every single day I am here.
hint: Say loneliness from being far from home is felt every single day

english_text: When things go wrong all at once it is hard to know which problem to face first.
hint: Say it's hard to know where to start when everything goes wrong at once

english_text: I miss the sound of my mother's voice and the smell of her cooking more than anything else.
hint: Say you miss your mother's voice and cooking most of all

english_text: The whole neighborhood became quiet with grief when the young child passed away so suddenly.
hint: Say the neighborhood fell quiet with grief when a young child died

english_text: He came home from the city with nothing and the sadness in his eyes was hard to witness.
hint: Say someone came home from the city with nothing and sorrow in his eyes

english_text: Even though I smile on the outside, there is a heaviness in my chest that will not go away.
hint: Say you smile outwardly but carry a heavy sadness inside

english_text: We cried together at the graveside and held each other because there were no words to say.
hint: Say you cried together at the grave with no words left to speak

english_text: She did not say much but the look in her eyes said everything that she was feeling inside.
hint: Say someone's eyes showed everything without any words

english_text: It breaks my heart to see my old parents struggling when I am not able to help them more.
hint: Say it breaks your heart to see aging parents struggle when you can't help more

english_text: I have not heard from my brother in six months and I am beginning to worry about him.
hint: Say you haven't heard from your brother in six months and are worried

english_text: The hardest thing in this world is watching someone you love suffer and being able to do nothing.
hint: Say watching a loved one suffer while you're helpless is the hardest thing
